title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Baidyanath - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Baidyanath - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Baidyanath has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Gurgaon office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Baidyanath:
Baidyanath is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Baidyanath!
